proxyUrl.label: Proxy URL
proxyUrl.help: Optional. URL Tokenash proxy (example: http://127.0.0.1:8787 or https://tokenash.example.com). Configured URLs probe-gated before provider routing. Auto-start opt-in only works local addresses.

proxyPort.label: Proxy Port
proxyPort.help: Default port used for auto-detect/auto-start when proxyUrl is not set (default: 8787).

pythonPath.label: Python Path
pythonPath.help: Optional explicit python executable for python fallback launcher (for example: python, python3, py, or full path).

retryMaxAttempts.label: Retry Max Attempts
retryMaxAttempts.help: Optional maximum number of upstream retry attempts for connection/read/5xx failures when the plugin auto-starts a local Tokenash proxy. Lower values fail faster for interactive chat.

connectTimeoutSeconds.label: Connect Timeout Seconds
connectTimeoutSeconds.help: Optional upstream connection timeout for the auto-started local Tokenash proxy. Lower values surface network failures sooner.

routeCodexViaProxy.label: Route OpenAI Codex Via Tokenash
routeCodexViaProxy.help: When enabled, OpenClaw will use the active Tokenash proxy as the in-memory upstream base URL for the built-in openai-codex provider so provider traffic flows through Tokenash.

gatewayProviderIds.label: Gateway Provider IDs
gatewayProviderIds.help: Optional list of OpenClaw provider ids to route through the active Tokenash proxy in memory. Friendly aliases codex, claude, copilot, and gemini are also accepted. When set, this overrides the default openai-codex-only routing.
